text:
Dave Glowacki wrote:
> 
> Palle Girgensohn wrote:
> > I was planning to make a tomcat
> > port, unless someone else is sitting on it already? Heard
> > anything about that?
> 
> Nope.  I've seen instructions for building tomcat pass by on
> freebsd-java, but I don't think anybody's built a port yet.

Apparently, there is a port (3.1, though) in ports-www. Hadn't
noticed that. It doesn't *build* though, but uses NO_BUILD...

/Palle
